name: polymath-connector-sentry
description: Sentry connector: MCP for errors/events/releases + UserPromptSubmit hook detecting Sentry issue URLs + triage-error skill.

sentryToken.title: Sentry API token
sentryToken.description: Auth token from Sentry Settings → Auth Tokens. Scopes: event:read, project:read, org:read.

sentryOrg.title: Sentry org slug
sentryOrg.description: Sentry org slug (the path segment in app.getsentry.com/organizations/<slug>/).
